title: Woodcutter Compats
description: A simple mod which adds additional wood types to charm and environmental's woodcutters
body:
**Woodcutter Compats** is a simple mod which adds additional recipes for other modded wood types to Charm's woodcutter and Environmental's Sawmill.
The recipes are consistent to the original mod, just expanded to encompass different wood varients from other mods. --- ### Version 1.2 contains critical bug fixes - Please update! --- Supported Woodcutter Mods (Currently): - Charm - Environmental Supported Biome Mods (Currently): - Atmospheric - Abundance - Autumnity - Environmental - Oh The Biomes You'll Go - Tinker's Construct *Feel free to use this mod in your modpack!*
